neighbors.name: Darrel D Howell & Lee Ann Howell
neighbors.claims: Darrel D. Howell (born 1968, age 57) and Lee Ann Howell (age 55) are residents of Cochise County, Arizona, with a listed home address in Huachuca City ([www.menstoppingviolence.org](https://www.menstoppingviolence.org/people/darrel-howell/#:~:text=Darrel%20Howell%2C%20born%20on%20October,email%C2%A0protected%5D%20and)) ([truepeoplesearch.net](https://truepeoplesearch.net/people/lee-howell#:~:text=Lives%3A)). Lee Ann Howell is also known as Lee Ann (Lee A.) Green in public records and is listed as a relative of Darrel Howell ([truepeoplesearch.net](https://truepeoplesearch.net/people/lee-howell#:~:text=Darrel%20Howell)). Public records show a past rural route mailing address for Lee Ann Howell in the Willcox area (ZIP 85643), indicating the Howells’ ties to that farming community ([truepeoplesearch.net](https://truepeoplesearch.net/people/lee-howell#:~:text=Locations%3A)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Since they have not voiced any stance, a low-key personal outreach by a project representative (e.g., a community liaison) is recommended to introduce the project and listen to any concerns.

overview_summary: Only one neighboring landowner is profiled, and their position on the development remains unknown. This individual also appears to have low community influence, with no public leadership roles or outspoken stance identified.
